title: Remote Control Feature Launch
description: Anthropic launched remote control functionality for Claude Code, initially available for Claude Max subscribers with planned expansion to Claude Pro users.

community_feedback.quote: Boris Cherny (Claude Code Creator) claimed he hadn't manually written a single line of code in 2 months. His team's workflow: '49 PRs in two days' - nearly 100% of development work done by Claude Code
Andrej Karpathy expressed feeling 'more behind than ever' as a programmer, noting that a 'magnitude 9 earthquake' was hitting the programming industry

title: Version 0.22.0 - Gemini 3 for Free Tier
description: Gemini CLI V0.22.0 opened Gemini 3 series models (Pro and Flash) to all Free Tier users. Also released Conductor extension for project management and Endor Labs extension.

title: Major AI Agent Feature Update
description: Cursor released a substantial update targeting AI Agent functionality on February 24, 2026, described as throwing down the gauntlet in the competitive AI programming tools market.

community_feedback.quote: Even with identical models, Claude Code outperforms Cursor in certain scenarios. The terminal Agent product form of Claude Code better fits complex engineering needs

title: ARM64 and Termux Support
description: Windsurf v1.3 released for ARM64 devices, enabling installation of Windsurf IDE on Android Termux and ARM64 Linux.
